mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Estate of Hugh Lane
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Estate of Hugh Lane Susan Lane, Widow Rufus T. Lane, Son Mary Ann Lane, Daughter Walter C. Lane, Son Lucy E. Lane, Daughter R.T. Akers, Administrator Recorded in Ledger Book 4, in the Floyd County Courthouse.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
